design_philosophy: Brutal & savage roast tone. Dark editorial/tabloid-magazine layout. Anti-design, neo-brutalist, high-contrast, designed to shock and be screenshot-worthy. A mix of underground comedy club and aggressive startup reality check.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Strict structural hierarchy masquerading as chaos. High tension asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use Tailwind CSS grid with `gap-px` on a border-colored wrapper, and background colors on children to create 1px rigid grid lines. Emulate a 'Control Room' or classified ads spread.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Always use sharp 1px borders (`border-[#27272A]`). `border-collapse` style layout. NEVER use rounded corners above `rounded-sm`.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (no border-radius). Solid bright primary (Red/Yellow) with black text. On hover: invert colors or solid black with primary border. Always include `data-testid`.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (`border-border`), no shadow. High contrast.
components.inputs_textarea: Massive, terminal-like text areas. 1px border. Focus state: `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] focus:outline-none`. No rounded corners. Background should be #050505.
components.roast_card_export: HTML-to-Image component. Must use the `texture_roast_card` background image overlaid at 20% opacity. Bold red score, monolithic typography, structured like a gritty report card, zine cutout, or classified ad.
components.leaderboard: Tabular, tightly packed rows. Rank numbers in massive font size.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Harsh, instant or snap transitions. Text color must invert sharply. No soft fades.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Minimal. Use a flashbulb effect (quick white flash) when submitting an idea to roast to simulate a camera capturing a mugshot.
motion_and_interactions.marquees: Use a kinetic texture marquee (`react-fast-marquee`) in the background with massive outline text (e.g., 'REALITY CHECK', 'DELUSION DETECTED') running at an angle or horizontally.

images.description: Lighted match stick in the dark. Represents sparking an idea or burning it down. Overlay heavily with black.
Dark crumpled cloth/paper texture. Overlay this on the shareable roast card with `mix-blend-multiply` or `opacity-20` for a gritty tactile feel.
Red neon sign glowing in the night. Good for authentication or paywall background imagery.

icons.usage: Use sharp, unrounded icons. Keep them minimal, scaling them up for graphic impact.

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: Massive H1 (e.g., 'YOUR STARTUP IDEA IS TRASH. LET US PROVE IT.'). Below it, a huge text area. No soft gradients. The hero should feel confrontational. Use the `comedy_neon_accent` image subtly in the background.
specific_page_instructions.roast_output: The focal point is the 'Roast Card' div (which will be converted to an image). It needs a brutal layout: A giant 1-10 score in Red, followed by 5 numbered bullet points. The layout should look like an invoice from hell or a tabloid cover.
specific_page_instructions.paywall_modal: Razorpay checkout modal should interrupt abruptly. 'ROAST #1 WAS FREE. PAY ₹49 FOR THE NEXT DOSE OF REALITY.' Use Warning Yellow (`#FFD60A`) as the primary button color here.
specific_page_instructions.leaderboard: The 'Hall of Shame'. Minimalist table. 1px borders between rows. The scores should be blood red. Massive rank numbers.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, forms, cards, and buttons MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='submit-roast-button'`, `data-testid='roast-card-export'`).
